calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a specially set Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Rolando Chitiquez.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3670. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Betzy Bras-Gonzalez, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Gregoria Encarnacion, who was placed under oath and testified.
Court Certified Spanish speaking interpreter Victor Martinez assisted Ms. Encarnacion during this morning's hearing.
Ms. Bras-Gonzalez, Ms. Encarnacion and Mr. Martinez all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Rolando Chitiquez.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Vehicle Related Personal Injury was filed on March 19, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint, Statement of Damages and accompanying damages on defendant Rolando Chitiquez occurred on June 10, 2019, and was effectuated on June 21, 2019.
Default as to defendant Rolando Chitiquez was entered on September 6, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 3, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Gregoria Encarnacion, and against the defaulted defendant Rolando Chitiquez, as follows:

General Damages - $46,157.00.
Special Damages - $23,078.50.
Punitive Damages - $69,235.50.
Costs - $650.00.

Total - $139,121.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
